samples.text: All string instruments are musical instruments. A violin is a string instrument. Therefore, is a violin a musical instrument?
Every string instrument belongs to the category of musical instruments. A violin is classified as a string instrument. Does this mean a violin is a musical instrument?
All bowed instruments are musical instruments. A concert violin is a bowed instrument. Therefore, is a concert violin a musical instrument?
A violin belongs to the group of string instruments. The group of string instruments falls under musical instruments. Based on this, is a violin a musical instrument?
All string instruments are musical instruments. A violin is a string instrument. The weather today is cloudy. Therefore, is a violin a musical instrument?
